Name: ESP32 DEVKIT V1
Purpose: The main microcontroller unit with integrated wiFi to handle secure https requests to the Spotify API

Name: PCB 5x7 Perfored Board
Purpose: Permanent mounting surface to sold the final circuit

Name: Dupont Jumper Wires (M-M)
Purpose: Male to Male Jumper Wires to connect the LCD screen

Name: Tactile Push Button Switch (6x6x5)
Purpose: Tactile buttons to pause/play and skip songs on the device

Name: Potentiometer WH148 10K Ohms
Purpose: Used to provide tactile control for volume adjustment

Name: 1.8inch LCD Display Module TFT Screen 128 x 160
Purpose: Visual Interface to display the Spotify tracks and album art
